title: Supporting Families Through Difficult Times
summary: Providing food assistance and welfare support to vulnerable families.
challenge: Many families struggled to meet basic feeding and household needs.
response: Food packs and welfare items were distributed to vulnerable households.
impact: Over 100 families received practical support and relief.
story: Families remain at the heart of strong communities.
The Foundation organized a family feeding support initiative to address immediate needs.
Beneficiaries received food items and essential supplies.
The programme provided relief and restored hope to many households.

quote.text: This support eased a burden that my family had been carrying for months.
quote.author: Family Beneficiary
